title: 2291 Building The Antikythera #xtool #p2
description:
Introduction Animation provided by Mateusz Baran

You can fine the files for this here: https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6768609
Iink to the machine: https://uk.xtool.com/?ref=Pbk3raZtQ4fUhz 

Discount codes
xToolUKYT80, ￡80 OFF for Orders over ￡999
xToolUKYT100,  ￡100 OFF for Orders over ￡1699

The drive was adapted from an OT Vinta gear and I didn't design it from scratch, it was heavily based on this model but converted into a model that is able to be laser cut and
printed: https://grabcad.com/library/antikythera-mechanism-4
These are all STL files so to laser cut open the file in something like Tinkercad and export as SVG.

Join this channel to get access to perks:
